message:
🐛 Remove active users widget from navbar, widen agent setup modal (#4007)

- Remove ActiveUsersWidget from both desktop and mobile navbar
- Widen AgentSetupDialog from md to lg so button text isn't cramped

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -27,7 +27,6 @@ import { TokenUsageWidget } from './TokenUsageWidget' import { ClusterFilterPanel } from './ClusterFilterPanel' import { AgentStatusIndicator } from './AgentStatusIndicator' import { UpdateIndicator } from './UpdateIndicator' -import { ActiveUsersWidget } from './ActiveUsersWidget' import { ROUTES } from '../../../config/routes' export function Navbar() { @@ -119,9 +118,6 @@ export function Navbar() { {/* Token Usage */} - {/* Active Users */} - - {/* Feature Request (includes notifications) */} @@ -201,9 +197,6 @@ export function Navbar() {
